description_long: This object consists of two green pears with a slightly irregular, rounded shape and a textured, matte skin. The pears display a range of green hues, with one showing several brownish spots and blemishes, indicating some ripeness and minor bruising. Both pears have visible stem ends, with the calyxes appearing dark and slightly shriveled. The surface is uneven, with small dimples and natural imperfections typical of fresh fruit. The pears are positioned close together, suggesting they were picked and placed as a pair. Their size and appearance are consistent with common edible pears found in markets or fruit bowls.
description: Two green pears with textured, slightly blemished skin and visible stem ends, showing natural imperfections and ripeness.
description_view_0: Front view showing both pears' stem ends and the overall round, slightly flattened shapes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smoother, less blemished sides and the elongated profile of the pears.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the distribution of brown spots and the full extent of surface blemishes.
description_view_3: Rear angled view focusing on the broader, less detailed backs of the pears with minimal blemishes visible.
attribute_contextual_placement: resting on its side in a fruit display or bowl
attribute_condition: slightly bruised with some brown spots, otherwise ripe and fresh
attribute_orientation: lying on its side with stem ends visible and bases touching the surface
